message:
fix: improve error handling across polecat/dog/session cleanup paths (gt-v9bb0)

- session_manager.StopAll: use errors.Join to collect all stop errors
- pending.TriggerPendingSpawns: emit Skipped result for not-ready spawns
- pending.PruneStalePending: only count pruned when Archive succeeds
- cmd/dog.runDogRemove: collect errors like runPolecatRemove instead of aborting
- cmd/seance: proceed with index cleanup even when lock acquisition fails
- cmd/sling_batch: clean up partial state when StartSession fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
